home_meta_title: Insurance Support | Expert Claim Recovery & Policy Advice India
home_meta_desc: Trusted Insurance Support in India. Dedicated experts for IRDAI claim appeals, LIC policy revival, and high-value health insurance. Recover your rejected claims today.
about_meta_title: About Insurance Support | 25+ Years of Trust in Claim Recovery
about_meta_desc: Meet our certified insurance advisors with 25+ years of experience. IRDAI-compliant insurance support for LIC, health, motor, and life insurance claims across India.
support_meta_title: Insurance Support Center — Claim Recovery, Document Help & Policy Services
support_meta_desc: Get expert help for stuck insurance claims, rejected health insurance appeals, LIC policy revival, lost document recovery, and Ombudsman complaint filing.

life-insurance.title: Best Life Insurance Plans in India | LIC & Private Policies – Insurance Support
life-insurance.description: Compare top LIC & private life insurance plans in India. Get free expert advice on payouts, nominees, and policy revival from our IRDAI-certified team. Free doorstep consultation.

health-insurance.title: Health Insurance Advisor India | Cashless & Claim Recovery Support
health-insurance.description: Get cashless health insurance tailored for you. We help resolve rejected claims, find network hospitals, and secure the best premium. 25+ years experience. Call now for a free review.

term-insurance.title: Term Insurance Plans India | High Cover at Low Premium – Free Quote
term-insurance.description: Buy high-coverage term insurance at the lowest premium in India. Our advisors compare all top plans and ensure claim settlement support. Get a free quote today.

motor-insurance.title: Motor Insurance Renewal & Claims India | Instant Quotes – Insurance Support
motor-insurance.description: Renew motor insurance in minutes. We compare all IRDAI-approved insurers, protect your IDV, and assist with zero-dep claims across India. Instant digital renewal.

cyber-insurance.title: Cyber Insurance in India | Data Breach & Fraud Protection Plans
cyber-insurance.description: Protect your business and personal data with India-specific cyber insurance. Coverage for ransomware, phishing, identity theft & data breach. Get a free risk assessment now.

sme-insurance.title: SME & Business Insurance India | Protect Your Company – Insurance Support
sme-insurance.description: Comprehensive business insurance for SMEs in India. Covers fire, liability, employee health, and trade credit risks. Expert advice for your industry. Call for a free consultation.

travel-insurance.title: Travel Insurance India | Trip Cancellation & Medical Coverage
travel-insurance.description: Secure your international and domestic trips. We provide travel insurance covering medical emergencies, trip cancellations, and lost baggage. Instant plans, 24/7 support.

pension-plans.title: Pension & Retirement Plans India | Secure Post-Retirement Income
pension-plans.description: Plan a worry-free retirement. Compare NPS, LIC pension, and annuity plans with expert guidance to maximize your post-retirement income. Book a free financial review.

ulip-plans.title: ULIP Plans India | Investment + Life Cover Advisor – Insurance Support
ulip-plans.description: Maximize wealth with ULIP plans combining life cover + market-linked returns. Our advisors benchmark fund performance and switch strategies for you. Free portfolio review.

wedding-insurance.title: Wedding Insurance India | Event Cancellation & Venue Coverage
wedding-insurance.description: Protect your big day with wedding insurance in India. Coverage for cancellations, vendor no-shows, fire, and accidental damage. Get quotes in minutes.

support_page.hero_desc: Your claim is stuck, rejected, or delayed? A policy lapsed years ago? Documents lost or misplaced? Our dedicated support center handles the toughest insurance problems that call centers and portals can't solve. Backed by 25+ years of experience and ₹50Cr+ in successful recoveries.
support_page.categories_desc: Select the area where you need help. Each category is handled by specialized advisors who deal with these exact scenarios daily — not generic call center agents.
support_page.steps_title: How to Get Support — 3 Simple Steps
support_page.steps_desc: We've simplified the process so you can get expert help without the bureaucratic runaround. Here's what happens when you reach out to our support center.
support_page.form_desc: Describe your issue and an expert advisor will call you within 2 hours.
support_page.talk_desc: Skip the form and speak directly to an insurance expert.

about_hero_subtitle: Decades of trust, expertise, and dedication to securing your future.
about_legacy_text_1: Insurance Support was founded with a singular mission: to demystify insurance and provide honest, expert advice to families and businesses across Bangalore and beyond.
about_legacy_text_2: Led by industry veterans with over 25 years of experience, we have grown from a small consultancy to a trusted partner for over 15,000 clients. Our journey is defined not just by the policies we sell, but by the claims we settle and the promises we keep.
about_meta_description: Learn about Insurance Support, our legacy of 25+ years, and our mission to secure families. Trusted by 15,000+ clients with a 98% claim settlement ratio.
about_page_title: About Insurance Support | 25+ Years of Trust
acceptance_of_terms_description:
• You must be at least 18 years of age and possess the legal authority to enter into a binding agreement.
• By using our services, you warrant that all information provided is accurate and truthful.
• Your continued use of the platform after any modifications to these Terms constitutes acceptance of the updated terms.
access_restricted_description: Sorry, access to this website from your location has been restricted. This restriction is in place due to regulatory or business requirements.
access_restricted_note: If you believe this restriction is in error, please contact our support team for assistance.
accuracy_of_data_description:
• Data Integrity: You are responsible for the accuracy of all information provided (Age, Health, Assets). Incorrect data may lead to policy cancellation or claim rejection by the insurer.
• Identity Protection: You agree to protect your account credentials and notify us immediately of any unauthorized access.

claim_filing_step_2: Collect all original hospital bills and discharge summaries.
claim_filing_step_3: Obtain a certified copy of the FIR (for motor or accident claims).

correct_form_errors: Please correct the errors in the form.

cyber_extortion_description: Assistance and coverage for ransomware attacks and digital threats.
cyber_insurance_benefit: Security against digital fraud, identity theft, and hacking.
cyber_insurance_long_description: Cyber insurance protects individuals and businesses from financial losses and damages resulting from cyberattacks, data breaches, and online fraud. In an increasingly digital world, it covers expenses like data recovery, legal fees, and liability costs, providing essential protection against evolving cyber threats.
cyber_insurance_meta_description: Get essential cyber insurance from Insurance Support to protect against cyberattacks, data breaches, and online fraud for individuals and businesses.
cyber_insurance_page_title: Cyber Insurance - Essential Digital Protection | Insurance Support
damage_to_property_description: Covers damages to the wedding venue or hired equipment.
data_breach_costs_description: Covers investigation and notification costs following a data breach.
data_driven_desc: Based on 25+ years of risk management insight and claim history.
data_retention_description: Data is retained only as long as necessary for policy administration or as required by law. Upon completion of legal requirements, data is securely erased or anonymized.
data_security_description:
We employ enterprise-grade security to safeguard your legacy:
• End-to-End Encryption (E2EE) for all digital submissions.
• Secure Cloud Storage with periodic penetration testing.
• Strict Internal Access Controls (Access is limited only to your dedicated veteran consultant).
disclaimer_text: Insurance is a subject matter of solicitation. Insurance Support is a professional advisory firm providing consultancy for IRDAI approved insurance products. All policy issuance and claim settlements are subject to the terms and conditions and underwriting of the respective insurance companies.
disclosure_of_your_information_descripti:
We enforce a zero-compromise confidentiality protocol. Your data is never sold, traded, or shared for third-party marketing. Disclosure is limited strictly to:
• Authorized Insurers: Sharing only essential data with chosen providers to facilitate your coverage.
• Law Enforcement: Only upon receiving valid, legally binding court orders.
• Claims Specialists: Only when necessary to ensure the successful processing of an active claim.
dont_item_payout: We do not issue claim payouts directly
dont_item_underwrite: We do not sell or underwrite policies
drive_with_confidence: Drive with confidence knowing you're protected
editorial_policy_text: Our content is authored and reviewed by IRDAI-certified advisors with decades of industry experience. We rely on official documentation from regulatory bodies like IRDAI and LIC to ensure accurate, up-to-date guidance.
expert_advice_personalized_plans: Expert advice for personalized insurance plans
expert_guidance_desc: Our experienced advisors help you navigate claims and find the best insurance plans.
expert_guidance_description: Our experienced Insurance Support advisors help you navigate claims and find the best plans.
explore_world_worry_free: Explore the world worry-free with our travel insurance
failed_to_copy: Failed to copy link. Please try again.
failed_to_submit_quote: Failed to submit quote. Please try again.
faq_aadhaar_link_a: You can link Aadhaar with your LIC policy online through the LIC website using your policy number and OTP-based Aadhaar verification. Alternatively, you can submit a self-attested copy of your Aadhaar card at the branch.
faq_aadhaar_link_q: How do I link Aadhaar with my LIC policy?
faq_car_transfer_a: The insurance must be transferred within 14 days of the vehicle's registration transfer. You need to submit the old policy, new RC (Form 29 & 30), and a small transfer fee to the insurance company.
faq_car_transfer_q: How to transfer car insurance to a new owner after a sale?
faq_cashless_a: Show your health card at the network hospital TPA desk within 24 hours of emergency admission. The insurer will approve it and settle the bill directly with the hospital.
faq_cashless_q: What is the cashless hospitalization process?
faq_change_nominee_a: Yes, you can change your nominee at any time during the policy term by submitting a 'Notice of Change of Nomination' form to the insurance company. This is crucial for ensuring your death benefits reach the right person.
faq_change_nominee_q: Can I change my nominee in an existing insurance policy?
faq_claim_rejected_a: If your insurance claim was rejected, you can file a complaint with IRDAI or approach the Insurance Ombudsman. Our experts specialize in claim recovery and will review your case and appeal the rejection on your behalf.
faq_claim_rejected_q: What can I do if my insurance claim was rejected?
faq_covid_coverage_a: Yes, as per IRDAI guidelines, all indemnity-based health insurance policies in India cover hospitalization expenses related to COVID-19, provided the policy was active during the illness.
faq_covid_coverage_q: Is COVID-19 covered under my old health insurance policy?
faq_cyber_a1: Yes, some personal cyber insurance plans offer protection and recovery assistance for social media account hacks.
faq_cyber_a2: Yes, it typically covers financial losses resulting from phishing, identity theft, and unauthorized online transactions.
faq_cyber_q1: Does cyber insurance cover social media hacking?
faq_death_claim_docs_a: You need the original policy bond, claimant statement, death certificate, and NEFT details. Our advisors help collect and submit these at your doorstep.
faq_death_claim_docs_q: What documents are required for a death claim?
faq_duplicate_policy_a: To get a duplicate LIC policy bond, you need to submit a written request to your home branch, pay a small fee, and provide an indemnity bond on non-judicial stamp paper. Our advisors can help you with the drafting and submission process at your doorstep.
faq_duplicate_policy_q: How can I get a duplicate LIC policy bond?
faq_grace_period_a: A grace period is an extra 15 to 30 days provided by the insurer to pay the premium after the due date without the policy lapsing. Claims made during this period are usually valid, subject to premium deduction.
faq_grace_period_q: What is the 'grace period' in an insurance policy?
faq_health_a1: Most plans cover pre-existing diseases after a waiting period, which usually ranges from 2 to 4 years.
faq_health_a2: It allows you to get treated at network hospitals without paying the bills upfront; the insurer settles it directly with the hospital.
faq_health_q1: Does health insurance cover pre-existing diseases?
faq_health_q2: What is a 'Cashless Claim' in health insurance?
faq_lic_surrender_a: The surrender value depends on the number of premiums paid, the term of the policy, and bonuses accrued. You can get an exact calculation by contacting our advisors.
faq_lic_surrender_q: How do I calculate LIC policy surrender value?
faq_life_a1: Typically, the entry age starts from 18 years up to 65 years, depending on the specific plan chosen.
faq_life_a2: Yes, you can hold multiple policies from different providers as long as you disclose them during the application process.
faq_life_q1: What is the entry age for life insurance?
faq_life_q2: Can I have multiple life insurance policies?
faq_loan_a1: We offer a wide range of loans including Home Loans, Personal Loans, Business Loans, Mortgage Loans, Vehicle Loans, and Education Loans to suit your various financial needs.
faq_loan_a2: Interest rates vary based on the lender, your credit score, and the loan amount. We help you compare and secure the most competitive rates available in the Indian market.
faq_loan_a3: The processing time depends on the type of loan and document verification. Generally, personal loans can be approved within 2-3 days, while home and business loans may take 7-10 working days.
faq_loan_a4: Standard documents include Identity Proof (Aadhar/PAN), Address Proof, Income Proof (Salary slips/ITR), and Bank Statements for the last 6 months. Specific requirements may vary by loan type.
faq_loan_q1: What types of loans do you offer?
faq_loan_q2: What is the typical interest rate for home loans?
faq_loan_q3: How long does the loan approval process take?
faq_loan_q4: What documents are required to apply for a loan?
faq_lost_bond_maturity_a: If the original bond is lost, you must submit a 'Loss of Policy Bond' indemnity (Form 3762) on stamp paper, along with an advertisement in a local newspaper if required by the branch. Our team handles the doorstep coordination for lost bond cases.
faq_lost_bond_maturity_q: How to claim LIC maturity amount if the policy bond is lost?
faq_maternity_cover_a: Many modern health insurance plans offer maternity cover, but they usually come with a waiting period ranging from 9 months to 4 years. It covers delivery costs (normal and cesarean) and sometimes pre/post-natal expenses.
faq_maternity_cover_q: Does health insurance cover maternity expenses in India?
faq_max_age_term_a: Most insurance companies allow individuals to buy term insurance up to the age of 60 or 65, with coverage extending up to age 75, 80, or even 100 in some 'Whole Life' variants. The earlier you buy, the lower the premium.
faq_max_age_term_q: What is the maximum age to buy a new term insurance plan?
faq_missed_renewal_a: If you miss the renewal date and the 30-day grace period, the policy lapses and you lose the 'No Claim Bonus' and 'Waiting Period' credits. You will likely have to undergo a fresh medical checkup for a new policy.
faq_missed_renewal_q: What happens if I miss my health insurance renewal date?
faq_motor_a1: Third-Party is mandatory by law, but a Comprehensive plan is recommended as it also covers damages to your own vehicle.
faq_motor_a2: NCB is a discount on the premium given to the policyholder for not making any claims during the previous policy year.
faq_motor_q1: Is Third-Party insurance enough for my car?
faq_multiple_policies_a: Yes, you can hold multiple life insurance policies. However, you must disclose all existing life covers to the new insurer at the time of application to ensure proper underwriting and avoid claim disputes later.
faq_multiple_policies_q: Can I have multiple life insurance policies from different companies?
faq_no_nominee_claim_a: In the absence of a nominee, the legal heirs must produce a Succession Certificate or Letter of Administration from a competent court to claim the death benefits. This is a complex legal process that our advisors can guide you through.
faq_no_nominee_claim_q: How to claim insurance if the policyholder dies without a nominee?
faq_paa_a1: Common reasons include nondisclosure of material facts, policy exclusions, delay in notification, or lack of medical necessity. We help you review the rejection letter and file an official appeal or ombudsman complaint.
faq_paa_a2: Yes, LIC policies can often be revived within 5 years from the date of the first unpaid premium. You will need to pay arrears with interest and provide proof of insurability. We assist in calculating the revival amount.
faq_paa_a3: Initially, the insurer has 30 days to respond to your grievance. If unresolved, the Insurance Ombudsman typically takes 3-6 months to pass an award. We guide you through each stage to expedite the process.
faq_paa_q1: Why was my insurance claim rejected despite having a policy?
faq_paa_q2: Can I revive an LIC policy that has been lapsed for 5 years?
faq_paa_q3: How long does the insurance claim appeal process take?
faq_pension_a1: Vesting usually starts between ages 50 to 70, depending on the plan you choose.
faq_pension_a2: Yes, premiums paid towards pension plans are often eligible for tax deductions under Section 80C.
faq_pension_q1: When can I starts receiving pension?
faq_rejection_reasons_a: Common reasons include non-disclosure of pre-existing diseases, delayed claim intimation, policy lapse due to unpaid premiums, and exclusions mentioned in the policy document. We specialize in appealing such rejected cases.
faq_rejection_reasons_q: What are the common reasons for insurance claim rejection?
faq_senior_life_a: Senior citizens can opt for specialized senior citizen term plans or whole life policies. It is important to look for plans with minimal medical waiting periods and comprehensive coverage limits.
faq_senior_life_q: What is the best life insurance for senior citizens?
faq_sme_a1: It covers damages due to fire, lightning, explosions, and sometimes natural calamities like floods or earthquakes.
faq_sme_a2: Actually, home insurance is quite affordable, often costing less than a few thousand rupees per year for significant coverage.
faq_sme_q1: What does Fire insurance cover for my business?
faq_term_a1: Yes, term insurance provides global coverage as long as the policy is active and the cause of death is covered.
faq_term_a2: Some plans offer 'Step-up' options to increase coverage at key life milestones like marriage or childbirth.
faq_term_q1: Will my family get the money if I die outside India?
faq_term_q2: Can I increase the cover amount later?
faq_tpa_vs_ins_a: A TPA (Third Party Administrator) is an intermediary commissioned by the insurance company to process health claims and provide networking services. The insurance company remains the ultimate risk-bearer and decision-maker for claim approvals.
faq_tpa_vs_ins_q: What is the difference between a TPA and an Insurance Company?
faq_travel_a1: Yes, most plans cover non-refundable costs if the trip is cancelled due to medical emergencies or other specified reasons.
faq_travel_a2: Most modern travel plans now include coverage for COVID-19 related medical emergencies and trip disruptions.
faq_travel_q1: Does travel insurance cover trip cancellations?
faq_travel_q2: Is COVID-19 covered in international travel insurance?
faq_ulip_a1: ULIPs have a mandatory lock-in period of 5 years.
faq_ulip_a2: Yes, most ULIPs allow you to switch between equity, debt, and balanced funds free of cost a certain number of times per year.
faq_ulip_q1: What is the lock-in period for ULIPs?
faq_ulip_q2: Can I switch between funds in ULIP?
faq_wedding_a1: Yes, many wedding insurance plans include coverage for theft or loss of jewelry and attire during the event.
faq_wedding_a2: It is best to buy it as soon as you start making significant deposits to vendors, usually 6-12 months before the event.
faq_wedding_q1: Does wedding insurance cover jewelry theft?
faq_wedding_q2: When should I buy wedding insurance?
faq_zero_dep_a: A zero-depreciation add-on ensures that the insurance company pays the full cost of replacing parts without deducting for depreciation. This is highly recommended for cars less than 5 years old to minimize out-of-pocket expenses during claims.
faq_zero_dep_q: What are the benefits of zero-depreciation car insurance?

It safeguards your savings from unexpected health crises and ensures you receive the best possible medical treatment without financial strain. Our plans offer extensive coverage, cashless facilities, and a wide network of hospitals.

how_can_we_help: How may we assist you today?
how_we_use_your_information_description:
Your data is used exclusively within a secure ecosystem for the following professional purposes:
• Portfolio Optimization: Analyzing your risk profile to secure the most competitive premiums.
• Claims Coordination: Using documented facts to advocate for your interests during claim settlements.
• Policy Management: Ensuring timely renewals and adjustments based on life milestones.
• Regulatory Compliance: Meeting the strict transparency standards of insurance regulatory authorities.
income_replacement_description: Ensure your family's lifestyle remains unchanged if you're not around.
information_we_collect_description:
We only collect data strictly necessary for strategic risk assessment and policy management:
• Personal Identification: Legal name, Date of Birth, and Gender for actuarial accuracy.
• Contact Protocols: Mobile number and secondary contact info for secure policy notifications.
• Risk Attributes: Detailed health history, motor vehicle details, or business assets depending on the consultation type.
• Financial Documentation: Sum assured requirements and income proof for high-value portfolio optimization.
instant_analysis_desc: Get your result in less than 30 seconds with our advanced algorithm.
intellectual_property_description: All content, logos, and proprietary tools on this website are the property of Insurance Support and are protected by international copyright and intellectual property laws.
interactive_tools_desc: Engage with our pro tools to evaluate your risk or recover your lost investments instantly.

life_insurance_benefit: Secure your family's future with up to ₹1 Crore cover and doorstep claim recovery assistance.
life_insurance_long_description: Life insurance provides financial protection for your loved ones in the event of your untimely demise. It ensures that your family can maintain their lifestyle, cover outstanding debts, and achieve future financial goals even when you're no longer there. We offer various types of life insurance, including term life, whole life, and universal life, tailored to your specific needs and budget.
life_insurance_meta_description: Explore comprehensive life insurance plans from Insurance Support. Protect your family's financial future with term, whole, and universal life insurance options.

limitation_of_liability_description:

• Indirect Damages: In no event shall Insurance Support be liable for any indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from the use of our platform.
• Technical Disruptions: We do not guarantee uninterrupted access to the site during maintenance or technical failures.

market_linked_risks_description:
• Investment Risk: For market-linked products like ULIPs, the investment risk in the investment portfolio is borne by the policyholder.
• Non-Guaranteed Returns: Past performance is not indicative of future results. Fund returns are subject to market volatility.
medical_emergencies_description: Coverage for unexpected illness or injury while traveling abroad.
medical_expenses_description: Cover hospital bills, surgery costs, and more.
motor_insurance_benefit: Instant renewal with zero depreciation and 24/7 roadside assistance.
motor_insurance_long_description: Motor insurance is mandatory for all vehicles and protects you against financial losses arising from accidents, theft, or damage to your vehicle. It also covers third-party liabilities. We offer comprehensive plans for private cars, two-wheelers, and commercial vehicles, ensuring you drive with peace of mind.
motor_insurance_meta_description: Get comprehensive motor insurance for cars, bikes, and commercial vehicles at Insurance Support. Protect against accidents, theft, and third-party liabilities.
motor_insurance_page_title: Motor Insurance - Drive with Confidence | Insurance Support
no_upfront_fees: No upfront fees for checking status.
not_found_meta_description: The page you are looking for does not exist. Return to the home page of Insurance Support.
official_sources_text: We strictly adhere to guidelines set by the Insurance Regulatory and Development Authority of India (IRDAI). For official verification, we recommend visiting [Bima Bharosa](https://bimabharosa.irdai.gov.in/).
original_bond_question: Do you have the Original Policy Bond?
our_mission_text: To empower every individual with the knowledge and protection they need to face life's uncertainties with confidence. We strive to be more than just advisors; we are your lifelong partners in financial security.
own_damage_cover_description: Protection against damages to your own vehicle due to accidents or theft.
peace_of_mind_priority: Your peace of mind is our priority
pension_plans_benefit: Ensure steady monthly income after retirement with tax benefits.
pension_plans_long_description: Pension plans are designed to provide a steady income stream after retirement, ensuring financial independence in your golden years. cyber-insurance.content:
In the digital era, cyber threats are a daily reality. From phishing attacks to ransomware, individuals and businesses across India are at constant risk. Cyber Insurance provides a safety net against financial losses caused by cybercrimes.

**Coverage for Individuals:**
*   **Theft of Funds:** Reimbursement for money stolen via phishing or bank fraud.
*   **Identity Theft:** Legal costs and expenses to restore your identity.
*   **Cyber Bullying:** Consultation costs for psychological trauma.
*   **Device Value:** Data restoration costs if your device is infected by malware.
cyber-insurance.description: Safeguard against digital threats with Cyber Insurance. Protect your finances and identity from phishing, ransomware, cyber extortion, and online fraud.

faqs.answer: Yes, most comprehensive plans cover financial losses due to UPI or credit card fraud.
faqs.question: Does it cover UPI frauds?

faqs.answer: Yes, a police complaint/FIR is mandatory for claiming losses due to cybercrime.
faqs.question: Do I need to file an FIR?

faqs.answer: Individual cyber insurance is different from corporate cyber liability insurance. We offer both types.
faqs.question: Does it cover business data breach?

cyber-insurance.title: Cyber Insurance

claim_process: Notify your insurer (or call us) within 24–48 hours of admission.
At network hospitals: show your health insurance card to the TPA desk to start cashless pre-authorisation.
Insurer reviews the pre-auth request — approval usually comes within 2–6 hours for planned procedures.
At discharge, pay only the non-covered amounts (co-pay, room rent excess, exclusions).
For reimbursement: collect all original bills, discharge summary, and doctor reports.
Submit the claim form + documents to your insurer within 30 days of discharge.
Insurer processes within 30 days — we follow up on your behalf if delayed.
health-insurance.content:
With medical inflation in India growing at over 14% annually, a single hospitalization can wipe out your entire life's savings. **Health Insurance** is not a luxury; it is a necessity. At Insurance Support, we specialize in **Cashless Claim Coordination** and **Rejected Claim Appeals**, ensuring you focus on recovery while our experts handle the TPA liaison.

**Our 'Why Us' Magnet for Health:**
Choosing a health plan is tricky. There are hidden clauses like "Room Rent Capping," "Co-payment," and "Waiting Periods." We decode the fine print for you.
*   **No Hidden Clauses:** We recommend plans with No Room Rent Capping and Zero Co-payment.
*   **Restoration Benefits:** We ensure your plan refills the sum assured if it gets exhausted during a treatment.
*   **Hyper-Local Coordination:** Direct paperwork support at network hospitals in Bangalore (Manipal/Apollo), Mumbai (Nanavati/Lilavati), Delhi (Max/Medanta), and Chennai (Apollo/MIOT).

**Specialized Service Pillars:**
*   **Individual & Family Floater:** Comprehensive coverage for you, your spouse, and children under a single premium.
*   **Senior Citizen Plans:** Specialized plans covering pre-existing diseases (Diabetes, BP) with minimal waiting periods.
*   **Critical Illness & Top-Up:** Cost-effective ways to increase your cover up to ₹1 Crore for a fraction of the premium cost.

**The '3-Hour' Cashless Promise:**
While standard approvals take 6-12 hours, our direct coordination via Star Health, HDFC Ergo, and Care typically secures initial pre-authorization in under 3 hours for our registered clients. In an emergency, **you call us**, and we handle the TPA desk while you stay with your family.
health-insurance.description: Get comprehensive Health Insurance with cashless treatment at top hospitals. Plans cover pre-existing diseases, maternity, and critical illness with no hidden clauses.

faqs.answer: Yes, but usually after a waiting period of 2 to 4 years. Some special plans shorten this to 1 year or less.
faqs.question: Does health insurance cover pre-existing diseases?

faqs.answer: In Cashless, the insurer pays the hospital directly. In Reimbursement, you pay first and claim the money back later.
faqs.question: What is the difference between Cashless and Reimbursement?

faqs.answer: Yes, specific plans offer maternity benefits, usually with a waiting period of 9 months to 2 years.
faqs.question: Is maternity covered in health insurance?

related_guides.label: How to Appeal a Rejected Health Insurance Claim

health-insurance.title: Health Insurance

Self-employed individuals and business owners who bear 100% of medical costs.
Families with senior parents — cover them before pre-existing diseases become exclusions.
Anyone with diabetes, hypertension, or a family history of heart disease.
Young couples planning a family who need maternity cover (buy early to beat waiting period).

claim_process: Nominee gathers the death certificate (original + 5 attested copies) and the original policy bond.
Fill LIC/insurer claim forms: Form 3783 (Claimant's Statement) and Form 3801 (Certificate of Death).
Submit documents to the servicing LIC branch or the private insurer's claims department (we assist with this).
Insurer acknowledges within 3 working days and assigns a claim number.
Medical investigation (if any) is completed within 6 months of claim submission for older policies.
Claim decision issued — if approved, payment via NEFT within 30 days.
If rejected, we file a written appeal and escalate to the Insurance Ombudsman if needed.
life-insurance.content:
Life insurance is the foundation of financial security for any family. It is not just an investment; it is a shield that protects your loved ones from financial instability in your absence. At **Insurance Support India**, we specialize in **LIC Policy Revival**, **Death Claim Recovery**, and **Maturity Settlement** to ensure your legacy remains intact.

**Why Trust Our Life Insurance Advisory?**
Unlike automated online comparison tools, we provide **personalized, human advisory** based on 25+ years of experience. We don't just sell a policy; we manage your portfolio for life.
*   **Claim Recovery Specialists:** We represent nominees in complex death claim cases and Insurance Ombudsman appeals.
*   **Doorstep Document Liaison:** We handle the physical paperwork (Form 3825, NEFT Mandates) at LIC branches across Bangalore, Hyderabad, Mumbai, and Delhi.
*   **CSR Benchmark:** We prioritize partnership with insurers (LIC, HDFC, Tata AIA) maintaining a 98.5%+ Claim Settlement Ratio.

**Strategic Portfolio Solutions:**
*   **Term Insurance (Pure Protection):** Get ₹1 Crore cover for ~₹1000/month. The most critical plan for any breadwinner.
*   **LIC Policy Revival:** Recover money stuck in lapsed policies from years ago. We calculate the exact health requirements and interest costs.
*   **Maturity Settlement (Lost Bonds):** We assist in reclaiming funds even if the original policy bond is lost or the nominee is not updated.

**Direct Branch Coordination:**
The true test of insurance is at the time of a claim. Our dedicated team handles everything—from document collection to branch visits. Your family will never have to run around offices; we stand simply by their side.
life-insurance.description: Secure your family's future with the best Life Insurance plans in India. Compare Term, Whole Life, and Endowment policies with high claim settlement ratios.

faqs.answer: It depends on your age and sum assured. Generally, for coverage above ₹50 Lakhs or for age above 45, a medical test is required.
faqs.question: Is a medical test mandatory for Term Insurance?

faqs.answer: A thumb rule is to have a cover that is 10-15 times your annual income.
faqs.question: What is the ideal life cover amount?

faqs.answer: Yes, you can buy multiple policies, but you must disclose existing policies to the new insurer.

Parents who want to fund their children's education even in their absence.

claim_process: Immediately after the accident: don't move the vehicle; document the scene with photos/videos.
File an FIR at the nearest police station (mandatory for third-party claims or theft).
Inform your insurer within 24 hours via their app, website, or by calling us — we file the intimation for you.
A surveyor is assigned — do NOT repair the vehicle until the surveyor has inspected it.
For cashless repairs: take the vehicle to a network garage; the insurer settles the bill directly.
For reimbursement: repair at your chosen garage, collect all original bills and claim forms.
Claim settled within 7–15 working days for straightforward cases — we track the status for you.
motor-insurance.content:
Driving on Indian roads is unpredictable. Whether it's a scratch in traffic or a flood in the monsoon, your vehicle needs robust protection. We provide **Instant Motor Insurance** that protects not just your car/bike but also your wallet from heavy repair bills and third-party liabilities.

**Why Renew With Insurance Support?**
Many people buy the cheapest policy online, only to realize later that the "IDV" (Vehicle Value) was too low or critical add-ons were missing.
*   **Maximum IDV:** We ensure your vehicle is insured for its correct market value, so you don't lose money in case of theft or total loss.
*   **Claim Assistance:** In case of an accident, we guide you on how to file an FIR, take photos, and get the vehicle to a cashless garage.
*   **Keep Your NCB:** We verify your No Claim Bonus (NCB) eligibility to save you up to 50% on premiums legally.

**Essential Add-Ons We Recommend:**
*   **Zero Depreciation (Bumper-to-Bumper):** Mandatory for cars <5 years old. The insurer pays 100% of the parts cost, including plastic and rubber.
*   **Engine Protection:** Covers engine seizure due to water logging (crucial for cities like Bangalore, Mumbai, Chennai).
*   **Roadside Assistance:** 24/7 help for flat tires, towing, or battery jumpstarts anywhere in India.
*   **Return to Invoice:** In case of theft, get the full on-road price back, not just the depreciated value.

**Coverage for All Vehicles**
*   Private Cars & SUVs
*   Two-Wheelers (Bikes & Scooters)
*   Commercial Vehicles (Taxis, Trucks, Buses)
motor-insurance.description: Renew your Car or Bike insurance instantly with maximum IDV and lowest premiums. Enjoy cashless claims, zero depreciation, and 24/7 roadside assistance.

faqs.answer: You can renew it online instantly. If the break-in period is long, a vehicle inspection might be required.
faqs.question: What happens if my insurance expires?

faqs.answer: It ensures you get the full claim amount without deduction for depreciation on parts (plastic, metal, rubber).
faqs.question: What is Zero Depreciation cover?

faqs.answer: Yes, as per the Motor Vehicles Act, third-party liability insurance is mandatory in India.
faqs.question: Is third-party insurance mandatory?

motor-insurance.title: Motor Insurance
who_should_buy: Every vehicle owner — Third-Party insurance is legally mandatory in India.
New car / bike owners who want Comprehensive cover to protect their investment.
Vehicle owners in flood-prone cities (Bangalore, Mumbai, Chennai) who need Engine Protection.
Anyone with a car loan — banks require Comprehensive insurance as a loan condition.
Fleet owners and commercial vehicle operators needing multi-vehicle policies.

pension-plans.content:
Retirement should be the golden phase of life, not a time of financial stress. Our Pension Plans help you build a substantial corpus during your working years, ensuring a steady stream of income post-retirement.

**Why Start Early?**
With the rising cost of living across Indian metro cities, reliance on savings alone is not enough. You need a dedicated pension plan that beats inflation.

**Types of Plans:**
*   **Deferred Annuity:** Accumulate now, get pension later (e.g., NPS, private pension plans).
*   **Immediate Annuity:** Pay a lump sum and get pension immediately (suitable for retirees).
*   **NPS Assistance:** We guide you on National Pension System tier selection and fund management.
pension-plans.description: Plan a stress-free retirement with our Pension Plans. Build a corpus for regular monthly income, inflation protection, and financial independence in your golden years.

faqs.answer: The commuted part (lump sum) is largely tax-free. The monthly pension is treated as income and taxed as per your slab.
faqs.question: Is pension taxable?

faqs.answer: Most plans have a lock-in period. However, partial withdrawals are allowed for specific reasons like children's marriage or critical illness.
faqs.question: Can I withdraw money before retirement?

faqs.answer: In joint-life annuity plans, the spouse continues to receive the pension.
faqs.question: What happens to the pension after death?

pension-plans.title: Pension Plans

sme-insurance.content:
Small and Medium Enterprises (SMEs) are the backbone of India's economy. However, they face unique risks ranging from fire accidents to employee liability. Our SME Insurance packages are custom-built for shops, offices, and startups across India.

**What We Cover:**
*   **Shopkeepers Policy:** Protects stock, furniture, and cash against fire and burglary.
*   **Office Package Policy:** Comprehensive cover for IT offices, including laptops and servers.
*   **Workmen Compensation:** Mandatory legal liability cover for employees.
*   **Public Liability:** Protects against third-party injury claims within your premises.

**Tailored for Indian Startups**
We understand the dynamic nature of startups and offer flexible plans that scale with your business.
sme-insurance.description: Protect your business with tailored SME Insurance solutions. Coverage for shops, offices, and startups including fire, burglary, liability, and employee benefits.

faqs.answer: It is not legally mandatory, but highly recommended to protect your inventory and livelihood.
faqs.question: Is property insurance mandatory for shops?

faqs.answer: Yes, Fidelity Guarantee cover protects against losses due to dishonesty of employees.
faqs.question: Does it cover employee theft?

faqs.answer: It depends on the value of contents, type of business, and risk factors associated with the location.
faqs.question: How is the premium calculated?

claim_process: Nominee notifies the insurer immediately after the death of the life assured.
Gather the original policy bond, death certificate, and the nominee's KYC documents.
Fill out the death claim form provided by the insurer (we assist you with this).
Submit all documents at the insurer's branch or via their online portal.
Insurer may conduct a quick verification for early claims (within 3 years of policy start).
Once approved, the sum assured is transferred to the nominee's registered bank account via NEFT.
We provide end-to-end support to ensure your family's claim is settled without stress.
term-insurance.content:
**Term Insurance is the most important financial product you will ever buy.** Period. It is a pure risk protection plan that guarantees a large sum of money (e.g., ₹1 Crore, ₹5 Crore) to your family if you pass away untimely. It ensures your family lifestyle, children's education, and home loans are taken care of.

**Top Features of Our Term Plans:**
*   **Unbeatable Premiums:** We source plans that offer ₹1 Crore cover for as low as ₹500 - ₹800 per month (depending on age).
*   **Lengthy Coverage:** Lock your premiums today and get coverage up to age 85 or even 99 (Whole Life Term).
*   **Riders for Extra Protection:**
    *   *Critical Illness Rider:* Get a payout if diagnosed with Cancer, Heart issues, etc., to cover treatment costs.
    *   *Accidental Disability:* Monthly income replacement if an accident leaves you disabled.

**Why Buy Term Insurance Through an Advisor?**
Buying online is easy, but claim settlement is hard. If your family faces a rejection due to a technicality in the proposal form filled years ago, the policy is useless.
*   **Zero-Error Proposal:** We fill out the proposal form with professional precision to eliminate chances of "Non-Disclosure" rejection.
*   **Medical Coordination:** We arrange your medical tests at your convenience.
*   **The "3-Day" Claim Guarantee:** In the unfortunate event of a claim, we personally handle the paperwork to ensure the money reaches your nominee's bank account within the shortest possible time.

**Tax Benefits**
Premiums paid for Term Insurance are eligible for tax deductions of up to ₹1.5 Lakhs under Section 80C of the Income Tax Act.
term-insurance.description: Get high life cover at affordable premiums with pure Term Insurance. Protect your family's financial future with critical illness and accidental death benefits.

faqs.answer: The earlier, the better. Buying in your 20s secures a very low premium for life.
faqs.question: What is the right age to buy Term Insurance?

faqs.answer: Pure term plans do not offer maturity benefits. However, 'Return of Premium' (ROP) plans refund all premiums paid if you survive.
faqs.question: Do I get money back if I survive the term?

faqs.answer: Standard term plans cover all deaths (natural/accidental). You can add an Accidental Death Benefit rider for extra payout.
faqs.question: Is accidental death covered?

travel-insurance.content:
Whether you are flying out of Kempegowda International Airport for a holiday or a business trip, unforeseen events can disrupt your plans. Travel Insurance protects you against medical emergencies, flight delays, and lost luggage.

**Essential for International Travel**
Many countries (like Schengen states) mandate travel insurance for visa approval. Our plans are 100% visa compliant.

**Coverage Highlights:**
*   **Medical Expenses:** Covers hospitalization costs abroad, which can be astronomically high.
*   **Trip Cancellation:** Reimburses non-refundable bookings if you cancel due to medical/emergency reasons.
*   **Baggage Loss/Delay:** Compensation for essential items if your bags are delayed.
*   **Passport Loss:** Assistance and coverage for obtaining a duplicate passport.
travel-insurance.description: Travel stress-free with complete Travel Insurance for domestic and international trips. Covers medical emergencies, flight delays, lost baggage, and trip cancellations.

faqs.answer: For many countries (Schengen, UAE, etc.), it is mandatory. For others, it is strongly advised.
faqs.question: Is travel insurance mandatory?

faqs.answer: Most standard plans exclude pre-existing conditions unless it is a life-threatening emergency.
faqs.question: Does it cover pre-existing diseases abroad?

faqs.answer: Ideally, as soon as you book your tickets to get coverage for trip cancellation.
faqs.question: When should I buy travel insurance?

travel-insurance.title: Travel Insurance

ulip-plans.content:
Unit Linked Insurance Plans (ULIPs) offer the dual benefit of investment and life cover. They are ideal for long-term wealth creation, allowing you to invest in potential high-growth equity funds or safe debt funds.

**Why Choose ULIPs?**
*   **Wealth Creation:** Participate in the stock market with professional fund management.
*   **Tax Efficiency:** Maturity proceeds are tax-free under Section 10(10D) (subject to conditions).
*   **Flexibility:** Switch between equity and debt funds based on market performance without tax implications.
*   **Lock-in Period:** A 5-year lock-in encourages disciplined saving.
ulip-plans.description: Combine insurance and investment with ULIPs. Create long-term wealth with market-linked returns while securing life cover and enjoying tax benefits.

faqs.answer: Modern ULIPs have very low charges, comparable to mutual funds. Some online plans even have zero allocation charges.
faqs.question: Are ULIP charges high?

faqs.answer: It depends on the fund choice. Debt funds are safer, while equity funds carry market risk but offer higher potential returns.
faqs.question: Is ULIP money safe?

faqs.answer: Yes, after the 5-year lock-in period, you can surrender the policy without surrender charges.
faqs.question: Can I surrender my ULIP?

ulip-plans.title: ULIP Plans

wedding-insurance.content:
A wedding is a once-in-a-lifetime event, and thousands of crores are spent on weddings in India annually. But unforeseen events like natural calamities, fire, or sudden illness can cause cancellations, leading to huge losses.

**What Coverage Includes:**
*   **Cancellation due to Disaster:** Fire, flood, or earthquake at the venue.
*   **Non-appearance:** If the bride, groom, or main family members cannot attend due to hospitalization/death.
*   **Public Liability:** Accidents or injury to guests during the function.
*   **Theft:** Loss of jewelry or cash from the venue/safe.
wedding-insurance.description: Insure your big day against cancellations and mishaps. Wedding Insurance covers venue damage, non-appearance, and public liability for a worry-free celebration.

faqs.answer: No, 'change of heart' is not covered. Only external uncontrollable events are covered.
faqs.question: Does it cover cancellation due to breakup?

faqs.answer: Ideally, at least 15 days before the event date.
faqs.question: When should I take the policy?

faqs.answer: Yes, public liability can cover claims arising from food poisoning of guests.
faqs.question: Is food poisoning covered?

wedding-insurance.title: Wedding Insurance

travel_insurance_meta_description: Travel with peace of mind with comprehensive travel insurance from Insurance Support. Coverage for medical emergencies, trip cancellations, and lost luggage.
travel_insurance_page_title: Travel Insurance - Explore Worry-Free | Insurance Support
trip_cancellation_description: Reimbursement for non-refundable trip costs due to emergencies.

trust_signals.privacy_promise: We respect your privacy. No spam, only expert advice.

ulip_plans_benefit: Wealth creation + life cover with flexible fund switching.
ulip_plans_long_description: ULIPs (Unit Linked Insurance Plans) offer the dual benefit of life insurance coverage and investment opportunities. A portion of your premium goes towards life cover, while the rest is invested in market-linked funds. This allows you to grow your wealth while also providing financial protection for your family.
ulip_plans_meta_description: Discover ULIP plans at Insurance Support, combining life insurance with market-linked investment opportunities for wealth growth and protection.
ulip_plans_page_title: ULIP Plans - Insurance & Investment Combined | Insurance Support
unexpected_error_submission: An unexpected error occurred during submission.
unrivaled_claims_support_desc: Veteran-led coordination during critical moments, standing by you when it matters most.
use_of_services_description:
• Advisory Role: Insurance Support acts as an insurance broker/aggregator. We facilitate the comparison and procurement of insurance policies from various insurers.
• Non-Insurer Status: We are not an insurance company. The contract of insurance is solely between you and the respective insurance provider.
• Strategic Facilitation: We provide professional guidance, but the final decision to purchase remains with the user.
we_will_not_spam: We respect your privacy. No spam, only expert advice.
wealth_creation_description: Grow your assets with our investment-cum-insurance plans.
wedding_insurance_benefit: Protect your special day investments from unforeseen cancellations.
wedding_insurance_long_description: Wedding and honeymoon insurance protects your significant investment in your special day from unforeseen circumstances. It can cover losses due to venue cancellation, vendor no-shows, extreme weather, or even medical emergencies during your honeymoon, ensuring your dream wedding isn't ruined by unexpected events.
wedding_insurance_meta_description: Safeguard your wedding and honeymoon with insurance plans from Insurance Support. Coverage for cancellations, vendor issues, and travel emergencies.
wedding_insurance_page_title: Wedding & Honeymoon Insurance - Protect Your Special Day | Insurance Support

contact.meta_title: Contact Insurance Advisor India | Call, WhatsApp & Free Consultation — Insurance Support
contact.meta_desc: Contact our IRDAI-certified insurance advisors for free expert help with claims, policy revival, health insurance disputes, and new policy quotes. Call +91 99866 34506 or WhatsApp us. Response within 2 hours.
contact.hero_desc: Get free, no-obligation advice from IRDAI-certified insurance advisors with 25+ years of experience. Whether you need help with a rejected claim, a lapsed LIC policy, health insurance dispute, or want to buy a new policy — we respond within 2 hours.
contact.help_with_title: What Can We Help You With?
contact.help_with_desc: Our advisors handle the full spectrum of insurance needs. Contact us for any of the following — your first consultation is always free.
help_items: LIC death claim denial or delay
Lost policy bond recovery & duplicate issuance
New life, health, or term insurance quotes
Policy loan against LIC or life insurance
contact.what_happens_title: What Happens After You Contact Us?

steps.title: We Respond Within 2 Hours
steps.desc: A qualified insurance advisor — not a call center — calls you back to understand your situation in detail.

steps.title: Free Case Assessment
steps.desc: We review your policy documents, rejection letters, or coverage needs and provide a clear action plan with realistic timelines.

steps.title: You Decide, No Pressure
steps.desc: Our consultation is 100% free with zero obligation. If you choose to proceed, we handle all paperwork and branch visits on your behalf.

contact.send_query_desc: Fill this form and an expert advisor will contact you within 2 hours.
contact.areas_serve_desc: While our office is in Bengaluru, we provide full insurance advisory and claim recovery support across all major cities in India through phone, WhatsApp, and video consultations. Our doorstep service is available across Bangalore Urban.
contact.faq_title: Frequently Asked Questions About Contacting Us

faqs.q: How quickly will I get a response?
faqs.a: We respond to all inquiries within 2 hours during business hours (Mon–Sat, 9 AM – 8 PM IST). For urgent claim emergencies like hospitalization, we provide immediate phone support.

faqs.q: Is the initial consultation really free?
faqs.a: Yes, absolutely. Your first consultation — whether by phone, WhatsApp, video call, or in-person — is completely free with zero obligation. We assess your situation, explain options, and only proceed if you choose to.

faqs.q: What information should I have ready before calling?
faqs.a: For the best consultation, keep handy: your policy number, rejection/delay letters from the insurer, medical records (for health claims), and Aadhaar/PAN for KYC. Don't worry if you're missing documents — we help locate lost paperwork too.

faqs.q: Do you provide support across India or only Bangalore?
faqs.a: While our physical office is in Bangalore, we provide full remote support across India via phone, WhatsApp, and video calls. We've handled claim recoveries for clients in Mumbai, Delhi, Hyderabad, Chennai, Pune, Kolkata, and 25+ other cities.

contact.final_cta_title: Don't Let Your Claim Slip Away
contact.final_cta_desc: Every day you wait, the insurance company gets further from settling your claim. Talk to an expert today — the consultation is free, and we've recovered ₹50Cr+ for families just like yours.

hlv_page.meta_title: Human Life Value (HLV) Calculator | How much Insurance do you need?
hlv_page.meta_desc: Calculate your Human Life Value (HLV) free. Find out the exact life insurance cover you need to secure your family's future based on your income and liabilities.
hlv_page.title: Human Life Value (HLV) Calculator
hlv_page.description: Most people are under-insured. Use this scientific calculator to find out the exact amount your family would need to maintain their lifestyle if you weren't there.
hlv_page.what_is_desc: Human Life Value (HLV) is a numeric value that represents your economic worth to your family. In insurance terms, it is the amount of money your family would need to replace your future earnings and pay off all liabilities if something were to happen to you today.
importance_items: It prevents Under-Insurance: Many people buy random policies (e.g., ₹5 Lakhs) which are insufficient.
It accounts for Inflation: Your family's expenses will grow over time.
It covers Liabilities: Home loans, personal loans, and children's education costs are factored in.
hlv_page.how_calc_desc: We use the Income Replacement Method adjusted for inflation and liabilities:
